name: Guangzhou Editorial Desk
shortBio: Maintains Guangzhou coverage with a focus on neighborhood contrast, Cantonese food planning, and Pearl River route logic.
fullBio: The Guangzhou Editorial Desk maintains guides, place pages, and planning coverage related to Guangzhou. Its focus is helping readers balance old-city texture with modern districts, use dim sum and dinner planning well, and connect riverfront, heritage, and transport decisions into a smoother city stay.
reviewProcess: Pages are reviewed for district usefulness, restaurant and timing tradeoffs, and whether the advice still reflects current Guangzhou travel patterns.
seoTitle: Guangzhou Editorial Desk | China Travel Notes
seoDescription: Meet the desk that maintains Guangzhou guides, place pages, and planning coverage on China Travel Notes.
